channel.title: hash table on Yunhua Fang
channel.description: Recent content in hash table on Yunhua Fang

item.title: 1.Two Sum
item.description: 1. Two Sum There are two different method. The first one is brute force enumeration. Enumerate all possible pairs until find the result. However, the algorithm has high time complexity, $O(n^2)$. The second method is using hash table to accelerate the searching part. In C++, we use unordered_map data structure. After define the hash table hasht, we use data values as key and their positions as value.
